# Label Aarfa

> Label Aarfa is an Indian women's ethnic-wear couture house founded in 2019, operating from a small atelier in New Delhi. The brand specialises in Pakistani-inspired co-ord sets, ready-to-wear stitched suits, unstitched fabric sets, and a luxury Premium line — made in small batches with handloom cottons, soft crepes, viscose muslins, pure rayon, Korean BSY, and silks. Garments are designed for everyday luxury, festive wear, and modern workwear, finished by hand and shipped across India and worldwide. Prices range ₹999 – ₹2,499 INR for the current inventory.

## Brand
- Name: Label Aarfa
- Tagline: Fashion Redefined
- Founded: 2019
- Founder: Aarfa
- Atelier: New Delhi, India
- Hours: Monday – Saturday, 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
- Contact: care@labelaarfa.com · +91 83688 07626

## Collections
- [Premium Collection](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/premium): The luxury line — Pakistani-inspired co-ord sets and suits in premium soft crepe, cotton-silk blend, Korean BSY, and berry crepe. Hand-finished, small batch.
- [Co-ord Sets](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/coords): Solid Farshi Salwar two-piece coords in premium natural rayon cotton with lace detailing. Five colourways (Pink, Black, Red, Lavender, Grey).
- [Pakistani Ready-to-Wear](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/pakistani): Three-piece Pakistani suits, Turkish coords with silk-crepe dupatta, Ajrakh-print sets with Kalamkari detailing. Fully stitched.
- [Unstitched Collection](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/unstitched): Unstitched suit fabric sets with Karachi-inspired prints, work-lace border detailing, and pure cotton dupattas. Stitch to your fit.
- [New Arrivals](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/new-arrivals): Latest pieces from the atelier across all four lines.
- [Sale](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/sale): Selected in-stock pieces at gentle prices when available.
- [All Products](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/all): The complete current catalogue.

## Featured Products
### Premium Collection
- Sabrina Maroon Co-Ord Set — Berry crepe, ₹1,999, sizes S–XXL.
- Mehnaaz Co-ord Set with Dupatta — Premium soft crepe, ₹2,499, off-white, sizes S–XXL.
- Ayra Studded Co-Ord Set — Berry crepe with diamond-studded neckline, ₹1,499, black, sizes S–XXL.
- Farinah Co-Ord Set — Premium soft crepe, ₹1,999, powder blue, sizes S–XXL.
- Raha Co-Ord Set — Premium cotton crepe blend, ₹1,999, available in Blue & Pink.
- Aliza Co-ord Set — Soft cotton crepe, ₹1,999, available in Green & Dark Blue.
- Renee Printed Co-Ord Set — Premium soft crepe, ₹1,550, grey, sizes S–XXL.
- Mia Co-ord Set — Pure cotton rayon, ₹1,650, Turkish-style, red, sizes S–XXL.
- Rebecca Co-ord Set — Premium soft crepe, ₹1,999, black multi, sizes S–XXL.
- Ambrina Embroidered Co-ord Set — Embroidered rayon, ₹1,850, black, sizes S–XXL.
- Lyra Co-ord Set with Dupatta — Soft premium crepe, ₹2,350, off-white floral, sizes S–XXL.
- Myra Polka Co-Ord Set — Premium soft crepe, ₹1,750, beige & black polka, sizes S–XXL.
- Faizah Royal Blue Lounge Co-ord Set — Soft Korean BSY, ₹1,650, royal blue, sizes S–XXL.

### Co-ord Sets
- Solid Farshi Salwar Co-ord Set — Premium natural rayon cotton with lace detailing, ₹1,250. Pink / Black / Red / Lavender / Grey, sizes S–XXL.

### Pakistani Ready-to-Wear
- Designer Ajrakh Print Suit Set — Pure Jaipuri cotton with Ajrakh-print lace dupatta, ₹1,250, yellow, sizes S–XXL.
- Ombre Luxury Suit — Cotton with chiffon printed dupatta, ₹1,499, pink, sizes S–XXL.
- Pakistani Turkish Coord Set (six prints) — Soft crepe with silk-crepe dupatta, ₹1,499 each.
- Pakistani Cutwork Printed Suit — Rayon with cotton-muslin digital-print dupatta, ₹1,550. Black Multi / Black Lavender, sizes S–XXL.

### Unstitched Collection
- Unstitched Karachi-Print Suit Sets — Pure jam cotton with Karachi print, rayon cotton bottom, cotton dupatta. ₹999 (19 prints available).
- Unstitched Party Wear Suit — Pure viscose muslin digital print with hand work, ₹1,600. Black / White.

## Client Diaries
The home page features a "Client Diaries" section with:
- Our Events: photographs from atelier moments and styling sessions.
- Client Reviews: women wearing Label Aarfa pieces in their everyday lives.
- Celebrity Spotted: a featured editorial card highlighting Label Aarfa pieces worn by public figures.

## About
- [Our Story](https://www.labelaarfa.com/about): Founded in 2019 by Aarfa, a Delhi-based designer who set out to make ethnic wear that feels personal and considered. Every garment is finished by hand in the atelier; the house works with master artisans across Jaipur, Delhi, and Lucknow to keep handloom and embroidery traditions alive.
- [Contact](https://www.labelaarfa.com/contact): Write to care@labelaarfa.com or call +91 83688 07626.

## Policies
- Free shipping on orders above ₹2,999 within India; ₹99 otherwise.
- No refunds or returns once an order is placed. For damaged, defective, or incorrect items, share a complete unboxing video within 24 hours of delivery to claim an exchange or coupon. Orders cannot be cancelled after placement.
- Dispatch within 2 business days. India delivery: 4–7 days. International: 7–14 days (flat ₹5,000 international service fee covers shipping, customs handling, and duties).
- Multi-currency display: INR, USD, GBP, EUR, AED, CAD, AUD.

## Optional
- [Sustainability](https://www.labelaarfa.com/about): Small batches, considered fabrics, and slow production — designed to be worn often and kept for years.
